FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU.title: Yu Qu
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU.description:
At the start of the run, add any number of quest cards from Mi Wang, Ku Xiu, and Fa Wei to your Deck.
At the end of each Act, all quest cards in your Deck gain 33% progress.
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU.flavor: Between taking and leaving, fate already turns.
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU.selectionPrompt: Choose quest cards to add to your Deck (any amount).
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU_YU_DUO.title: Yu Qu Yu Duo
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU_YU_DUO.description:
At the start of the run, add any number of quest cards from Mi Wang, Ku Xiu, and Fa Wei to your Deck. Relics gained from quest cards are upgraded.
At the end of each Act, all quest cards in your Deck gain 33% progress.
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU_YU_DUO.flavor: To take and to seize, all in one thought.
FEIYAP_RELIC_INVESTIGATOR.title: Investigator
FEIYAP_RELIC_INVESTIGATOR.description: Gain the Ancient card Ke Xue Zheng. At the start of each combat, gain [green]{RegenPower}[/green] [gold]Regen[/gold].
FEIYAP_RELIC_INVESTIGATOR.flavor: "We will meet again, because you are..." — Investigator, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_FEI_SHENG_YI_WEN_ZI.title: Fei Sheng Yi Wen Zi
FEIYAP_RELIC_FEI_SHENG_YI_WEN_ZI.descrip: Gain the Ancient card Ke Xue Zheng. At the start of each combat, gain [green]{RegenPower}[/green] [gold]Regen[/gold].
FEIYAP_RELIC_FEI_SHENG_YI_WEN_ZI.flavor: "The wound is shallow — lie still." — Investigator, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_SWORD_SAINT.title: Sword Saint
FEIYAP_RELIC_SWORD_SAINT.description:
Gain the Ancient card Fei Ying Yu Hua Luo.
[gold]Perfect Iaido[/gold] deals [blue]500%[/blue] more damage.
FEIYAP_RELIC_SWORD_SAINT.flavor: "The battlefield, a homeland I miss..." — Sword Saint, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_WU_MING_REN.title: Wu Ming Ren
FEIYAP_RELIC_WU_MING_REN.description:
Gain the Ancient card Fei Ying Yu Hua Luo.
[gold]Perfect Iaido[/gold] deals [blue]1000%[/blue] more damage.
FEIYAP_RELIC_WU_MING_REN.flavor: "Listen with your ears, strike with your heart." — Sword Saint, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_MERRY_WITCH.title: Merry Witch
FEIYAP_RELIC_MERRY_WITCH.description: Gain the Ancient card World XXI. When alternating [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold], damage, [gold]Block[/gold], and [gold]Iaido[/gold] value are increased by [blue]25%[/blue].
FEIYAP_RELIC_MERRY_WITCH.flavor: "Will this world be more interesting than the last?" — Merry Witch, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_KUANG_XIAO_MO_NV.title: Kuang Xiao Mo Nv
FEIYAP_RELIC_KUANG_XIAO_MO_NV.descriptio: Gain the Ancient card World XXI. When alternating [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold], damage, [gold]Block[/gold], and [gold]Iaido[/gold] value are increased by [blue]50%[/blue].
FEIYAP_RELIC_KUANG_XIAO_MO_NV.flavor: "Dance! Sing! Entertain me with all you have — until the end of your life!" — Merry Witch, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_LAPLACE_DEMON.title: Laplace Demon
FEIYAP_RELIC_LAPLACE_DEMON.description: Gain the Ancient card World Shards. Upon pickup, also gain Archaic Tooth and Touch of Orobas. All card rewards are upgraded.
FEIYAP_RELIC_LAPLACE_DEMON.flavor: "I have seen every future. You are not in them." — Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_GOU_CHEN_YI.title: Alpha Herculis
FEIYAP_RELIC_GOU_CHEN_YI.description: Choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards from your deck. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
FEIYAP_RELIC_GOU_CHEN_YI.flavor: "A star seal changes the chart forever." — Star-Slasher, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_SHI_YOU_YUAN_QI.title: Cebalrai
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_SHI_YOU_YUAN_QI.descri: Choose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Rare[/gold] card from your character's card pool to add to your deck.
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_SHI_YOU_YUAN_QI.flavor: "Only rare light belongs on your chart." — Star-Slasher, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_JIN_SI.title: Altair
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_JIN_SI.description: Upon pickup, choose a [gold]Power[/gold] card to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]Infusion[/purple].
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_JIN_SI.flavor: "Hidden power wakes at the first star-chime." — Star-Slasher, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_ZHI_NV_YI.title: Vega
FEIYAP_RELIC_ZHI_NV_YI.description: Upon pickup, choose an [gold]Attack[/gold] card to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]Assault[/purple].
FEIYAP_RELIC_ZHI_NV_YI.flavor: "One blade falls; the next follows before it lands." — Star-Slasher, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_HE_GU_ER.title: Altair β
FEIYAP_RELIC_HE_GU_ER.description: Upon pickup, choose a [gold]Skill[/gold] card to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]Rekindle[/purple].
FEIYAP_RELIC_HE_GU_ER.flavor: "Even ash can burn again." — Star-Slasher, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_LANG_XING.title: Sirius
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_LANG_XING.description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional card. Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, draw [blue]{ShuffleDraw}[/blue] cards.
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_LANG_XING.flavor: "The brightest star blinks in the deepest night." — Star-Slasher, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_NAN_HE_SAN.title: Fomalhaut
FEIYAP_RELIC_NAN_HE_SAN.description: Each turn, the first time you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], and [gold]Power[/gold], draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card.
FEIYAP_RELIC_NAN_HE_SAN.flavor: "Three paths, three currents." — Star-Slasher, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_SHEN_SU_SI.title: Betelgeuse
FEIYAP_RELIC_SHEN_SU_SI.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Energy}[/blue] Energy. You cannot play [gold]Attacks[/gold] on your first turn.
FEIYAP_RELIC_SHEN_SU_SI.flavor: "When the red star rises, stillness comes before motion." — Star-Slasher, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_FEN_HUANG_ZUO_A.title: Phoenix A
FEIYAP_RELIC_FEN_HUANG_ZUO_A.description: Upon pickup, remove up to [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards from your deck. Lose [red]{MaxHp}[/red] Max HP for each card removed.
FEIYAP_RELIC_FEN_HUANG_ZUO_A.flavor: "Before rebirth, something must burn away." — Star-Slasher, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_SHI_YUE_TIAN_LONG_ZUO_LIU_X: Whenever you draw a [gold]Status[/gold] card, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
"Every falling star is a slash." — Star-Slasher, Feiyap Clan.
